Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
279 
TPL_INSRNC_CVRG_IND 
LABEL: 
Third-Party Liability (TPL) Insurance Coverage Indicator — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary has some form of third-party liability (TPL) insurance 
coverage; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: TPL_INSRNC_CVRG_IND 
LONG NAME: TPL_INSRNC_CVRG_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S):
